content.full_text:
January 2, 2002

Robin Sexton
Director of Business Development
Gnossos Software
1701 K Street, N.W., 10th Floor
Washington, D.C. 20006-1511

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-01-236

Dear Ms. Sexton:

According to our records, on September 25, 2001, you submitted a letter requesting approval of a modified filing format for the Recipient Committee Campaign Statement (Form 460). This is to confirm that per our subsequent telephone conversation, you withdrew your request.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division
